LanguageData.ABY_VesperLance.label: vesper lance
LanguageData.ABY_VesperLance.description: A hyper-precise relic recovered from a reactor-saint shell. Its geometry is too clean for infernal industry and its discharge resembles a sanction more than a weapon. Repeated hits place a target under brief judgement before the beam collapses into a punitive burst.
LanguageData.ABY_VesperLanceBeam.label: vesper lance beam
